title: hieracium dasytrichum subsp. pseudopiliferum
intro: Hieracium dasytrichum subsp. pseudopiliferum is a subspecies of the Hieracium dasytrichum plant, a type of hawkweed that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is known for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which may be attributed to its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Hieracium dasytrichum subsp. pseudopiliferum are not well-documented, but it is believed to have antiseptic and antitumor properties. However, its herbal preparations are mostly used in traditional medicine, and more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
